name: PrivHound: Count findings by type
description: Summary count of all PrivHound findings grouped by relationship type, ordered by frequency.
query:
MATCH (u:PHUser)-[r]->(n)
WHERE type(r) STARTS WITH "PHCan" OR type(r) STARTS WITH "PHHas"
RETURN type(r) AS FindingType, count(*) AS Count
ORDER BY Count DESC
